changelog: Critical bridge fix: structured CortexResult.Fail payloads now reach MCP clients (was An-error-occurred before). Sandbox: closed 3 reflection bypass holes in send_code_to_revit; allow zero-arg obj.GetType(). create_schedule: reports skipped fields with suggestions instead of dropping silently; accepts both bare strings and object specs. clash_detection: maxResults and tolerance now configurable (was silently capped at 100). bulk_modify_parameter_values dryRun: 98 percent smaller responses, element sample now opt-in via includeSample. list_family_sizes: optional real file-size measurement via includeSize=true. Docs: PBIP live-test README includes the required -Force flag.
